creator: zgabor@code.hu
text:
a) On the catopen(3), catgets(3) and catclose(3) manual pages, the reference
to the companion gencat(1) program is missing.
b) On the catgets(3) and catclose(3) manual pages, the reference to the
setlocale(3) function is missing.  It _is_ on catopen(3).

Fix: 

Hmm.
How-To-Repeat: 
	man 3 catopen catgets catclose
